_doc: Per-scene panic-onset frame indices for the UMN crowd-anomaly dataset (Mehran et al. 2009). Frames before onset are normal (label=0), onset and beyond are anomalous (label=1). The numbers below are the canonical values widely cited in the social-force / sparse-reconstruction baselines; if your local split differs, edit them.
_columns: scene_name -> {onset_frame, end_frame}; end_frame is exclusive. Set end_frame to -1 to mean 'until end of clip'.
